creator: rz@fabmicro.ru
text:
I don't think I have a mess on my system:

root@butterfly:/home/rz # pkg update -f
Updating FreeBSD repository catalogue...
Fetching meta.conf: 100%    163 B   0.2kB/s    00:01    
Fetching packagesite.pkg: 100%    6 MiB   1.1MB/s    00:06    
Processing entries: 100%
FreeBSD repository update completed. 31818 packages processed.
All repositories are up to date.

I reinstalled a number of libs (bzrtp, et), now Linphone starts, but:

1. It shows windows that don't fit into the screen (Linphone wrongly detects screen size), windows are not resizable, so I cannot access its controls.

2. It does not recognize H264 codec any more. Mediastreamer and msopen264 packages are installed and up-to-date.
